parsed.explanation: Fixed character encoding errors (e.g., √¼ to ü), corrected the closing tag typo </PRICE> to </PRIZE>, fixed the malformed title in item 6, corrected the place name 'Rein' to 'Bern' for consistency, and cleaned up non-standard symbols (√†) that were likely OCR artifacts.
